<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\VarDumper\Caster; /** * Represents a single backtrace frame as returned by debug_backtrace() or Exception->getTrace(). * * @author Nicolas Grekas <p@tchwork.com> */ class FrameStub extends EnumStub { public function __construct( array $frame, public bool $keepArgs = true, public bool $inTraceStub = false, ) { parent::__construct($frame); } }
